🧭 CC 2.1.205 → 2.1.206 Adoption

Decision board — 9 auto-flagged candidates, ground-truth verified. Docs-only latest_known bump.

floor 2.1.183 — FROZEN (override → 2026-09-20) latest_known 2.1.204 → 2.1.206 🟣 1 strong · 🟢 1 note · 🟡 4 rows · ⚪ 3 no-op branch feat/cc-2.1.205-206-adoption

Candidate verdicts

Behaviour change that matters — EnterWorktree

Before (≤ 2.1.205)

  • EnterWorktree ../repo-task enters silently
  • ork's ../<repo>-<task> convention = outside .claude/worktrees/
  • No prompt regardless of location

After (2.1.206)

  • External-path EnterWorktree → one-time confirmation prompt
  • Interactive: just confirm ✅
  • Headless/agent: use Agent(isolation:"worktree") or pre-authorize
  • Raw git worktree add unaffected (tool-only change)
Full triage → docs/audits/cc-adoption-2.1.205-206-triage-2026-07-10.md · Method: parallel Explore ground-truth (~60% of auto-flagged gaps were false positives, as expected).
